name: Z-Image Turbo
description: Fast 4-step text-to-image using the Z-Image Turbo (Lumina2/AuraFlow) diffusion model. Distilled turbo model: cfg is fixed at 1 and res_multistep/simple sampling is baked in. Good default for quick, high-quality 1024x1024 generations. Params: prompt (required), width, height, steps (4 recommended), seed.
